evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 one more bounded official Nebraska county-local pass on the public ArcGIS item resource and metadata surfaces. `https://gis.ne.gov/portal/sharing/rest/content/items/76a6ec0ec7c449448c95d00f59002457/resources?f=json` returned HTTP 200 and listed exactly 9 resources, but they are only the published `config/config.json` plus static image assets under `images/`; there is no CSV, table, county assignment file, service-area export, or hidden operational dataset in that public resource list. The paired Web Map resource list at `https://gis.ne.gov/portal/sharing/rest/content/items/4bdbf8e8703743b0b2ff290f98737825/resources?f=json` returns `{"total":0,"resources":[]}`. Both metadata XML routes return HTTP 404, and the ExperienceBuilder info-file endpoint at `.../info/iteminfo?f=json` returns `{"error":{"message":"Info file for item not found"}}`. Combined with the already-reviewed published config, empty related-items endpoints, and contact-only FeatureServer schema, Nebraska therefore still exposes no hidden public county-assignment artifact and remains final-blocked on county-local disability resources.
